svg.title: OpenAMRobot mobile base system block diagram
svg.desc: Four grouped subsystems. Compute: Raspberry Pi 5 and Teensy 4.0 linked over USB. Sensing: AS5040 encoders (quadrature) and MPU6500 IMU (I2C) to the Teensy; RPLIDAR A1 (USB) and Camera Module 3 (CSI) to the Pi. Actuation: Teensy to 2 ZBLD drivers to 2 BLDC motors to wheels. Power: 24 V lead-acid to drivers, 5 V buck to Pi, 3.3 V logic to encoders and IMU.
svg.text: OpenAMRobot mobile base — system block diagram
Coloured lines = power rails (24 V / 5 V / 3.3 V) · grey lines = data (bus type labelled)
